nodes.name: OriStudio-功能架构图.html
nodes.summary: SVG-based functional architecture diagram of OriStudio showing the seven core modules and their interconnections.

nodes.name: OriStudio-完整实施计划.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan with four phases: P0 compliance fix (3 days), P0 core capabilities (5-6 days), P1 UX experience (4 days), and P2 documentation sync (1 day), listing all backend and frontend files to modify.

nodes.name: OriStudio-完整建设方案.html
nodes.summary: Complete OriStudio construction scheme HTML presentation covering system architecture, module layout, and phased implementation plan.

nodes.name: OriStudio-技术架构图.html
nodes.summary: SVG-based technical architecture diagram of OriStudio showing frontend, backend, database, and infrastructure layers.

nodes.name: master-design-v3.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive design overview covering v1 positioning for illustrators/AIGC artists, creator type support matrix, four-version roadmap (v1-v5), seven-module architecture, data flow matrix, API model statistics, technical stack, and 42 reserved tables for future creator type expansions.

nodes.name: requirements-v3-final.md
nodes.summary: Final requirements document for v3 establishing v1 focus on illustrators and AIGC artists with honest capability declarations for other creator types.

nodes.name: technical-feasibility-report.md
nodes.summary: Technical feasibility assessment covering fourteen capability ratings, code-versus-document gap analysis, and phase-by-phase implementation recommendations.

nodes.name: ux-design-spec.md
nodes.summary: UX specification covering three-step onboarding wizard, ten empty-state designs, nine term optimization strategies, interaction patterns, and mobile-responsive design guidelines.

nodes.name: version-roadmap.md
nodes.summary: Multi-version roadmap from v1 through v5 detailing agent collaboration configurations, data model extensions per creator type expansion, and implementation timelines.
